one_time_description: Impairment loss on investment in Kimesskanemenow Limited Partnership due to decrease in revenue source from Victor Mine closure
economic_notes: Nation operates Attawapiskat Power Corporation (electricity distribution), Attawapiskat Enterprises (catering, security, contracting). Victor Mine closure impacted Kimesskanemenow LP investment. CMHC reserve fund deficiency of $543,399.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - statements do not present comparison with originally planned results (no budget comparison). Nation was operating under a Management Action Plan per Indigenous Services Canada directives at financial statement date (going concern). GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Attawapiskat Power Corporation and Attawapiskat Enterprises. Attawapiskat Health Services Board reported no revenues/expenses as Nation manages those operations directly. Attawapiskat Power Corporation year-end is December 31, 2019 (different from Nation's March 31). CMHC reserve fund deficiency of $543,399.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
Going concern uncertainty noted by auditor — ability to continue operations is at risk
High ISC dependency (85.46%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
